design_intent: Sun-drenched Coastal California living room with bleached oak, natural rattan, linen, and sea-glass tones; relaxed, airy, and softly tailored with light textures and breezy warmth.

selected_pieces.product_name: Dyonery 158" Extra Large Modular Sectional Sofa, CHENILLE Fabric with Deep Seat, Tool-Free Assembly
selected_pieces.placement_note: Float the sectional on the main seating wall in an open U-shape, leaving a generous walkway behind it; orient the long side toward the windows so the chenille catches the daylight softly.

selected_pieces.product_name: Wooden Round Pedestal Coffee Table - Natural
selected_pieces.placement_note: Center it over the rug directly in front of the sectional, keeping about 16 inches of clearance from the sofa for an easy coastal lounge layout.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Rattan TV Stand For TV Up To 65 Inch Entertainment Center Media Console Cabinet With Sliding Door,abstract,Light Wood,59in,4.92ft
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place it centered on the TV wall, low and horizontal beneath the screen, with a few inches of breathing room on each side so the rattan fronts remain visually open.
Lay the rug so the front legs of the sectional and any chairs sit on it, anchoring the seating group with its woven texture and subdued indigo striation.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2pk 50"x84" Blackout Aruba Curtain Panels Sour Cream - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hang the curtains high and wide on the window wall, brushing just above the floor to soften the bright south light without darkening the room.

selected_pieces.product_name: 24"x30" Scalloped Wall Mirror Natural Wood - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Mount it on the wall opposite the windows, slightly above console height, to bounce light deeper into the room and echo the soft coastal curves of the seating.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Ceramic Planter with Stand - White Ceramic Pot with Bamboo Base - Indoor & Outdoor Decorative Plant Holder - 8" White
selected_pieces.placement_note: Set it in one front corner near the windows, where the bamboo base and white ceramic can read as a quiet sculptural note against the daylight.
